name: io.github.klodr/gmail-mcp
description: Gmail MCP server — scope-gated tools (read-only / send-only / modify) with attachment and download path jails, OAuth credentials hardened to 0o600, supply-chain hardening (Sigstore attestations + SPDX/CycloneDX SBOMs + npm provenance).

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_OAUTH_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Google OAuth2 client keys file (gcp-oauth.keys.json). Defaults to ~/.gmail-mcp/gcp-oauth.keys.json.

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_CREDENTIALS_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the persisted OAuth credentials file (refresh token + granted scopes). Defaults to ~/.gmail-mcp/credentials.json.

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_ATTACHMENT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory from which outgoing attachments may be read. Enforced as a realpath jail (symlinks to outside are rejected). Defaults to ~/GmailAttachments/.

environmentVariables.name: GMAIL_MCP_DOWNLOAD_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where downloaded emails and attachments are written. Opens the leaf with O_NOFOLLOW to defeat symlink-based jail escapes. Defaults to ~/GmailDownloads/.
